title: Evaluate relevance against a judgment set
description: Run a set of judged queries and report nDCG/precision@k/recall before and after a ranking change.
body: Use when assessing or comparing ranking configurations. Actions: load the judgment set (queries with graded-relevant documents), execute each query against the index, and compute nDCG, precision@k, and recall, reporting the aggregate and per-query deltas against the baseline. Compare before/after for any proposed change. Do not approve a ranking change from a single-query impression. This skill exposes capability only and does not deploy ranking changes without permission. Validation signals include an aggregate relevance metric across the judgment set. Risk boundary: a change that improves one query but regresses the aggregate must not ship; report the regression rather than the anecdote.
